zh-CN.summary: TI15 模拟器 Windows 内部试玩测试包。当前仅面向朋友小范围测试，提供便携版 zip 下载镜像，下载后可解压运行。
changelog: 提供 Windows x64 便携版内部试玩包。
提供 GitHub Release 与百度网盘两个下载镜像。
当前测试范围为朋友内部试玩，暂不发布 macOS、Linux 或正式安装包。
knownIssues: 当前仅提供 Windows 版本，macOS 和 Linux 暂未发布。
这是内部试玩测试包，可能存在启动、显示、存档或玩法流程问题。
GitHub Release 和百度网盘镜像均已提供；如果某个镜像临时不可用，请切换另一个镜像重试。

en.summary: TI15 Simulator Windows internal playtest build. This preview is shared with a small group of friends as portable zip download mirrors.
changelog: Provide a Windows x64 portable internal playtest package.
Provide both GitHub Release and Baidu Netdisk download mirrors.
Limit this build to a small internal playtest; macOS, Linux, and formal installers are not published yet.
knownIssues: Only the Windows build is available for now; macOS and Linux builds are not published.
This is an internal playtest package and may include startup, display, save, or gameplay-flow issues.
Both GitHub Release and Baidu Netdisk mirrors are provided; if one mirror is temporarily unavailable, try the other.

files.filename: TI15Simulator Windows x64 portable preview zip

note: This file is currently maintained manually from src/data/downloads.ts.
